French

Narratif généré : CarteDeConcepts FRNonHumanSubjectLMCDAFHIR

This mapping does not specify any particular context of use.


Groupe 1 Mapping de https://interop.esante.gouv.fr/ig/document/core/StructureDefinition/fr-lm-sujet-non-humain to https://interop.esante.gouv.fr/ig/document/core/StructureDefinition/fr-cda-sujet-non-humain

Code sourcerelationCode cible
FRLMSujetNonHumainis equivalent toFRCDASujetNonHumain
FRLMSujetNonHumain.sujetis equivalent toFRCDASujetNonHumain.subject.relatedSubject.code
FRLMSujetNonHumain.adresseis equivalent toFRCDASujetNonHumain.subject.relatedSubject.addr

Groupe 2 Mapping de https://interop.esante.gouv.fr/ig/document/core/StructureDefinition/fr-cda-sujet-non-humain to https://interop.esante.gouv.fr/ig/document/core/StructureDefinition/fr-observation-laboratory-report-results-document

Code sourcerelationCode cibleCommentaire
FRCDASujetNonHumainis equivalent toFRObservationLaboratoryReportResultsDocument.specimen
FRCDASujetNonHumain.subject.relatedSubject.codeis equivalent toFRObservationLaboratoryReportResultsDocument.specimen.subject:Substancespecimen.subject = Reference(Substance).

Groupe 3 Mapping de https://interop.esante.gouv.fr/ig/document/core/StructureDefinition/fr-cda-sujet-non-humain to https://interop.esante.gouv.fr/ig/document/core/StructureDefinition/substance

Code sourcerelationCode cible
FRCDASujetNonHumain.subject.relatedSubject.codeis equivalent toSubstance.code
FRCDASujetNonHumain.subject.relatedSubject.code.qualifier.valueis equivalent toSubstance.category

title: Mapping Metier/CDA/FHIR : "Sujet non humain"

description: Mapping des éléments du modele metier FRLMSujetNonHumain vers l'element CDA FRCDASujetNonHumain, puis vers les ressources FHIR Observation/Specimen/Substance.
